title: xAI in Internal Crisis: Elon Musk Suggests a Complete Rebuild

title: Goa Aims to Launch AI Policy in 100 Days, Says IT Minister Rohan Khaunte
description: The Goa government is set to unveil its Artificial Intelligence Policy within 100 days, as announced by IT Minister Rohan Khaunte in the legislative assembly. The policy includes integrating AI in schools and developing an AI readiness index for departments.
content: Porvorim: State govt is trying to notify the Artificial Intelligence Policy for Goa within the next 100 days, said IT minister Rohan Khaunte in the legislative assembly on Friday. He said the policy is being formulated and that substantive feedback f... [547 chars]

title: Musk says xAI must be 'rebuilt' amid co-founder exodus, SpaceX IPO
description: With xAI now in the hands of SpaceX, Elon Musk says he's rebuilding the artificial intelligence company following high-level departures.
content: Less than six weeks after Elon Musk merged SpaceX and xAI in a deal he valued at $1.25 trillion, the world's richest person is acknowledging that his artificial intelligence startup "was not built right first time around, so is being rebuilt from the... [3123 chars]

title: Mankind's fate at the hinge of history

title: These dividend stocks will benefit from AI and an aging population, Jefferies says
description: Artificial intelligence is being integrated into senior housing companies and some names will rise above the rest, according to Jefferies.

title: AIS outlines targets for upcoming Clicx Bank
description: Advanced Info Service (AIS), in conjunction with partners Krungthai Bank (KTB) and PTTOR, plan to launch an artificial intelligence (AI)-driven virtual banking service in Thailand by June named Clicx Bank, in a bid to capture a slice of the lucrative 180-billion-baht smartphone market.

title: Europe takes first step to banning AI-generated child sexual abuse images
description: Europe on Friday took the first step towards outlawing artificial ​intelligence practices which generate child sexual ‌abuse material after EU governments proposed to add this provision to the bloc's landmark AI rules adopted ​two years ago.
content: BRUSSELS, March 13 (Reuters) - Europe on Friday took the first step towards outlawing artificial ​intelligence practices which generate child sexual ‌abuse material after EU governments proposed to add this provision to the bloc's landmark AI rules a... [1001 chars]

title: IT’s time to migrate to AI: Indian tech firms must stop being effort
description: Artificial intelligence is changing how businesses operate globally. India's IT sector, built on skilled labor, faces margin pressure as AI boosts efficiency. Companies that own AI infrastructure, like chip makers and cloud providers, capture more value. India must adapt by reskilling its workforce and investing in its own AI capabilities to remain competitive and shape the future of intelligence.

title: Is the star-studded optimism around Nscale on the money?

title: WVU Medicine goes all in on AI medical transcription software Abridge
description: West Virginia University Medicine is accelerating its rollout of an artificial intelligence transcription software developed by Pittsburgh-based startup Abridge. A small pilot started in May has grown to over 1,200 doctors, nurse practitioners and physician assistants adopting Abridge to fill out charts while they talk to patients, WVU Medicine leadership
